calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-01-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Petitioner: Brenda Jo Ann Dunn aka Raven Soluna Cianan, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
Faxed copy of the Proof of Publication received in court.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
Pending Original Proof of Publication, The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Raven Creature.
Petitioner to sumit an Original Proof of Publication to the court this afternoon.

2:00 P.M.
Original Proof of Publication received and filed in court.
Decree signed by Comm. Kaplan.
